titleStmt.title: SII 15.36: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 36. (B.K. No. 109 of 1926-27.) HOSŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall of the Śiva temple.

This is dated the 10th regnal year of the king, Prabhava, Pushya śu. 13, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, corresponding to 1148 A.D., January 5. The Saṅkramaṇa, however, occurred on 1147 A.D., December 25, Thursday.

It registers the renewal of the gift of a betelnut garden for the worship of the god Mūlasthāna and for repairs, etc. made by Hollagāvuṇḍa of Hosavūr for the beatitude of his deceased father Nākigāvuṇḍa and senior uncle Boppagāvuṇḍa. Hollagāvuṇḍa belonged to the Sinda family and Kunnula race. The gift was received by the teacher Gaṅgēśvara-paṇḍita of the Pāśupata sect in the presence of the Seven Hundred. The record gives the genealogy of Hollagāvuṇḍa and describes the valour and meritorious deeds of his ancestors. It also refers to Sakaḷaprakāśa as administering the heggēri of Muḷugunda and also Hosavūr. Other gifts such as income derived from cess on betel leaves, etc., are also mentioned.

In the concluding portion which refers to the administration of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chāmuṇḍarasa bearing the epithet Toṇḍamaṇḍaḷika [śuṇḍāla] pañchānana, is recorded the gift of income from Pannāya to the god by his subordinate Pergaḍe Kalidēvanāyaka, the adhikāri of Bhaṇḍārada Basavamayya-nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrīmaccaḷukyavaṁśalalāmaṁ sa¨rvvajñacakrava¨rttiya sutanuddā
mapratāpi vasudhādhāmaṁ jagadēkamallarāyaṁ naga¨rdaṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśva
ra paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatpratāpacakrava¨rtti jagadēvamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhiprava¨rddhamā
namācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . ka . prakaṭiteyaśōnaṭīna¨r�kananavadhiguṇagaṇā nvitaṁ sakaḷakaḷādhikaneṁdu pogaḷadavarā¨rssakaḷaṁ sakaḷaprakāśabaṭā rakaraṁ .
© svasti yamaniyamasyādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa maunānuṣṭhāna parāyaṇaruṁ tribhuvana mallavallabhasabhāprabhāvitapravādipracaṇḍarumappa tribhuvanamalla
dēvarārādhya¨rssakaḷaprakāśabhaṭṭāraka¨rmmuḷuga nāda heggēriyumanā vīranārāyaṇa dēvara kuttuṁv®tti hosavūranāḷda� . v® . jaḷadhiv®tāvanīva
dhuge kuntaḷadaṁte virājisittu kuntaḷaviṣayaṁ tadu¨rvvareyoḷu�vaḷedha¨rmmanivāsabhūmi beḷvolamatasēvyamā janapadānanadaṁtevūleṁtu nōḷpaḍaṁ sale
muḷugunda hannera�moppuguvuttamabhōgabhūmivōl . © . svastyaśēṣadharātaḷā nanda si�kuḷava�kanda nandanavanavasantanuṁ . vīralakṣmīkāntanuṁ . bāvannavīrāgraga
ṇya ka�kuḷāṁbhōjamitraṁ . vairimanneyalatālavitraṁ . dhai¨ryamaṁdaramahīdharaṁ muḷgu�davidyādharaṁ parivṛtavidagdhavibudhavrajaṁ . pannagamahādhvajaṁ .
koṟaluguṁṇḍānvayaṁ . prabaḷatējōmayaṁ . vidviṣṭaduṣṭakāḷiṁgagajabhīmaṁ . kāminī kāmaṁ . vīrarasabhōjanuṁ . vyāghralāṁchanaṁ . nāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrī
manmuḷugun�ṁ hanneṟaḍaramanneyaṁ bopparasar . kaṁ . rakṣisi dha¨rmagaḷanupalakṣisi kunnu lana caratamaṁ rapujayadūḷakṣativettaṁ sale sinda kṣatriyanenipa boppanahi
tajhaḷappaṁ . Ā panneraḍaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ . v® . [I]re madhupāḷi poṁjaḍeya saurabhamaṁ taṇivannavīṁṭi bittaradoḷe nandanāḷigaḷoḷaṁpugaleṁbuvu pūtacūtadoḷ pa
rivṛta kōkiḷapratatiśāḷivanāḷige līleyiṁde pāydaragiḷi sāvadhāna posavūresaguṁ nirantaraṁ . hosavūrē cagavuṇḍanujvaḷayaśa śrīkāṁtanātaṁge puṇya
sati prauḍhe vinīte sītegeṇeyappaḷu kaṁcigāvuṇḍi rājisu daṁpatigaḷuga puṭṭida siṁgakke ¨ryyanippasaviṁ boppagavuṇḍanaṁ jananuta śrī nāki gānaṇḍanu . Allinā
kigāvuṇḍana parākramamuṁ prabhutvamumeṁteṁdaḍe . © bandenena kāḷagada naḍevasa nettariṁdoṁdeḍe khaṇḍadiṇḍigega de bhūtapiśācakōṭiyiṁ doṁdeḍe bi¨rdda vī
rabhaṭareḷugaruḷūḷ toḍa¨rddaśvarājiyidondeḍe nōḍaladbhutavenippudu nākiya gelda yuddhadoḷ . mūlasthāna viśāla śivālayamaṁ boppanoppiralu māḍisidaṁ kaiḷā
śōpama morakēśālayamaṁ nāki puṇyanidhi māḍisidaṁ . paḍeda dhanaṁ mṛḍapūjege mṛḍa pratiṣṭhege mṛḍāśrayapratatige takkeḍege tapōdhana¨rggittēṁ paḍedanō dhanamaṁ vivēki nā
kigāvuṇḍaṁ . Ā vibhuge bhōgiyakkaniḷāvadhugeṇeyenisi biṇpaniṁbadoḷire yiṁtī vidha saduguṇagaṇadiṁde tā vadhuviṁduvadana kū¨rppa kulavadhuvesedaḷ . Antava¨rgge
puṭṭida viśrāṁtadoḷaṁ vibhavadoḷaṁ vudāradoḷaṁ cairantanareṇeyane seṇasuva¨rggaṁtakanenale sava putrakaṁ prabhu hollaṁ . pitṛdhanamaṁ tiṁdunmattateyeṁdi¨rpparama puruṣa nallaṁ
dēvāyatanakke kerege śatrakke taṭākakkettudhanamanesavaṁ hollaṁ . paravanitākēkarabhīkara bāṇaṁ naḍeda śaucaguṇavidu lōkōttaravī hollagāvuṇḍana doreyāritera¨rpparāṁ ganāpu
trakanoḷ . v® . kāntada moggeraṁ harigeyoḍḍaṇavettida vājirāji māṟāṁtade kāḷarakkasa nivaṁ javaniṁtivanendarāti vibhrāṁtiyaneyde koluva galvudba(lvadbhu)ta vīranoḷuṁ
�rā vikrāṁta hollanoḷ ripuhṛdisthaḷasallanoḷājimallanoḷ . ka . Enisi hollagavuṇḍana manassarōvaramarāḷabāḷike tānaṁbinagaṁ kulavadhuvādaḷ ja
nōnuta cāvuṇḍigavuṇḍi vanitāratnaṁ . svasti samastasatyaśaucācāranayavinaya śīḷasaṁpannanuṁ . vibudhaprasannanuṁ . nijakuḷanaḷinīṣaṇḍamā¨rttaṇḍanuṁ . prajemacce ga
ṇḍanuṁ . catussīmeya dha¨rmmasaṁrakṣiṇaika dakṣamaṁ . ni¨rvikārākāramanasija sa ddakṣanuṁ . paranadhūdārasmērakēkarāḷōkamā¨rggaṇa gaṇātidūranuṁ . saṁsārasāranuṁ bha
yalōbharahitanuṁ . vasumatīmahitanuṁ . jayavadhūdhāmanuṁ . saṁgrāmabhīmanuṁ mūlasthāna mōrakēśvarādidēvāyatana viśā�śiḷāmayavitatakūṭakōṭi viṭaṁ
kani¨rmmāpaṇa ṣṭhanuṁ śivaliṁgapratiṣṭhāgariṣṭhanumappa śrīmannāḷprabhu hosavūra hollagāvuṇḍaṁ tannūranēkabhōgada gāvuṇḍikeyanāḷdanubhavisutti¨rddaṁ . va . Uṟadāṁtaṁgaṁtakaṁ
tānenisidadaṭanī mallagāvuṇḍanādaṁ kiṟiyayyaṁ bhuvanaviśrutaviśadayaśaṁ kāvagāvu ṇḍanu vaṭṭāgi¨rddanaṁti¨rvvarumanupamaviśrāṁtakaunnatyadindaṁ naṟedi¨rddī hollagāThe letter vu is engraved below the line.
vuṇḍana vijayabhujādaṇḍavi¨rppaṁtiri¨rddar . v® . takkudanīvarilla śivayōgige viprajanakke dēvasaṁ vāśrayakke śivapūjege śiṣṭajanakke sa¨rvvadha¨rmmakkanurāgadinde besakayva
mahōṁnati gaḷu nūdārakṛti makkaḷunnatikevettariva¨rśśivapādar . ka . dhare pogaḷalā śivadha¨rmmada pāravariyoḷa puṇyabījamaṁ bitti niraṁtaramane beḷavi beḷasirikaravesede
ttēḷu nū¨rvvaruṁ kṛtakṛtyar . © puruhota bhavanamuṁ khēcarabhavanamuṁmidara pōlvigeydevene bandhura mūlasthānēśvara varabhavana śilāmayaṁ karaṁ raṁjisuguṁ . © kāḷēśa
vrati suvibhavabhavanani¨rmmitekī¨rttivilōlanannadānasadāḷaṁbaṁ jñāna rāśiyatipati ye sadaṁ . tacchiṣya¨rmūlasthānadēvara sthānācā¨ryyar . ka . kṣameyaṁ
kūrisi dārameya māḍi kāruṇyasudhā meyineṟagisidanatyu ttamanī gaṁgēśvarā¨ryyanu¨rvvīvinutaṁ . v® . bēḍavaṁ tāpasanandakkariganālēkhyaṁ naṭaṁ
gāyakaṁ nuḍikāṟa kavi paurāṇika paṇḍita yeṁdiṁtiva¨rgganna dāna dodavi gaṁgēśvarā¨ryya jasaṁ baḍedaṁ pāśupataprasiddhatapamūlasthāna yōgī
śvaraṁ . svasti . śrīmaccāḷukyapratāpacakrava¨rtti jagadēkamalladēvava¨rṣada 10 neya prabhava saṁvatsarada puṣya śuddha 13 sōmavāramumuttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa vya
tīpāta kūḍida puṇyatathiyoḷ śrīmannāḷprabhu hollagāvuṇḍaṁ tamma piriyayyaṁ boppagāvuṇḍaṁgaṁ tammayyaṁ mahāprabhu nākigāvuṇḍaṁgaṁ parōkṣavinayamā
gi taṁdeya dha¨rmmamaṁ puna¨rbbharaṇaṁ māḍi śrī mūlasthānadēvara kalvesakke māṭa kūṭa prasādādigaḷgamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍevantāgi tānuveḷunū¨rvvaruvi¨rddu gaṁgēśvara
paṇḍitara kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi sa¨rvvanamaśyamuṁ sa¨rvvabādhāparihāramu māgi biṭṭaḍakadōṁṭa mōrakēśvaradēguladiṁ baḍagaleraḍu tōṁṭaṁgaḷiya kaṇi
ya baṭṭeyiṁ paḍavalūra mundaṇa pariva kārigeyiṁ mūḍaloṁde sthaḷaṁ tavarājada tōṁṭa vondu . kallabhāviya tōṁṭavondu . paṭṭava¨rddhanada tōṁṭavondu . Antu tōṁ
ṭeṁ 3 dēva¨rggaṁgabhōgakke sa¨rvvanamasyamāgi kadaṁbakeyyiṁ baḍagalu biṭṭa kisu mattarāṟu . gurugaḷa bhikṣegendu gāvuṇḍageyyoḷage vāyavyadalu biṭṭa mattarūndu .
v® . biḍadārādhisi vittamaṁ vividhamōhavyūhadiṁdi¨rppa tammaḍiya dha¨rmmada pe¨rmme nū¨rmmaḍiyenalu kaiḷāsakutkīḷadoḷ paḍiyaṁboṁdu viḷāsamaṁ taḷaya mūla
sthānamuttuṁgamaṁ dhareyalu māḍisidaṁ śilāmayamanīgaṁgēśayōgīśvaraṁ . tadgurudha¨rmmaprabhōdhanayiṁ paṁkajanābhanābhipadmōdbhavavaṁśaja daṁḍanāyakaṁ suṁkada mē
dirājanadhikārigaḷī mahādēva dōvarā�ṁkanumiṁtu dēva paya nāraṇadēvanu meṁba nālvaru kiṁkara¨rkkuḷiya suṁkada pe¨rggaḍegaḷu mahōnnatar . Antava¨rśrī
mūlasthānadēvara cayitrakkaṁ pavitrārōpaṇakkaṁ dēvara tōṁṭadeleyaḍakeya kuḷiya suṁkamaṁ sa¨rvva namasyavāgi biṭṭar . ka . sādada pe¨rggaḍe dha¨rmmavinōdaṁ dēva¨rgge naḍava
gāṇada teṟeyaṁ sādaradoṁdīgaḷīdeṟeyādudanittaṁ śivaṁge mahādēvaṇnaṁ . pāśupatabrata niyamadoḷā sakaḷādriya lēsalla mahimōṁnatiyiṁdīśvaratanuvenalabhinava pāśu
pataṁ jēṣṭarāśi yatipatitiḷakaṁ . Ārādhitagurucaraṇa¨rnnityadiṁ bhramararāgamānvitacarita ¨rmmāramada bhaṁjanōṁnata¨rggāruṇya śrī jēṣṭarāśi yatipuṁgavaro
ḷ . v® . javanoḷu tāguvana janajalipa kāḷavyādhanaṁ pāyva bhairavanaṁ bhaikaripaṣṭadiggaja doḷāṁpudrēkadiṁ siṁgamaṁtivivēḷuṁ jaḷarāśiyaṁ kadupi niṁdāpōśanaṁgoḷuThe letter ḷ is written above the line.
vaneṁdavarā¨rggaṇḍina toṇḍarappu gurumānū¨rvva¨rjjagadbhuṁbhukar . Intatipracaṁḍarappu gura mūnū¨rvvaruṁ dēvaraṁgabhōgakke dōṇiyaloṁdu paṇamaṁ koṭṭar . ka . ja
pe¨rggaḍevibhu dōvarasadēva¨rgge nityapūjege koṭṭajaragaydokkala teṟeyaṁnirantara naḍegidippa śivapadabhaktaṁ . v® . saṇasuvavaṁge koṁḍiḍuvavaṁguradaṁge paraṁga saṁga
rāṁgaṇadoḷa tōruva¨rṇnosalaka suḷakudu kaṭṭisaṁdaṇisida ruṁḍa mālegaḷinaṭṭuta bhairavarūpaniṁtu balukaṇigaḷa dārogeya patākeya billamahā
[bhaṭa¨rkka]ḷoḷ . paṇekaṭṭaṁ taleyāṁtu tāḷdi śaraṇeṁdātaṁge māṟāṁta rāvaṇanandaṁga vidi¨rccuva¨rggirisaridviṁdhyāṭavīdēśabhūṣaṇaruddaṇḍavirōdhida¨rppadaḷana¨rssāmānyamē saṁ
garāṁgaṇadoḷ tāgi taruṁbalā¨rppadaṭarārī billamūnū¨rvvaroḷ . ka . Aṇuvaṁ niṁbaṁ māraguṇayutanimeḷagenisi bennamabūvāgraṇigaḷa mūlasthāna triṇē
trabhavanaṁ nirantaraṁ beḷaguvinaṁ . naṁdādīvigegidutāneṁdu naḍevaṁdu dōṇisāsi ¨rvvarumānandadoḷī būvarayvarumoṁdāgi¨rddāḷoḷondu pāgamanittar . Intī dha¨rmmamaṁ gāvuṁ
ṇḍanaṁveḷunū¨rvvaruṁ pratipāḷisuvar . ka . kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumanavayavade suva¨rṇnadiṁdekaṭṭisi viprapravara¨rgge koṭṭa phaḷavī śivadha¨rmmōddharaṇarenipa puṇyajanaṁgaḷ . gaṁgāsā
gara yamunāsaṁgamadoḷ kōṭi kavileyaṁ brāhmaṇara liṁgigaḷaṁ sale puṇyadinaṁga ḷūḷaḷidava¨rggaḷappariṁtidanaḷidar . ślōka . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harē
tavasuṁdharāṁ saṣṭiva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . © sūriliya mukhya paṇḍitara kavite . kallukeṟeya bammōjana kaṇḍaraṇe maṁgaḷa .
svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanu mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ maṁḍaḷikamā¨rttaṁḍaṁ kadanapracaṁḍaṁ nuḍidaṁtegaṁḍaṁ puḍemuṭṭida gaṁḍaṁ toṁḍamaṁḍa
ḷika śuṁḍāla paṁcānanaṁ sāhasōttuṁgaṁ bhujabalabhīmaṁ vīra cāvuṁḍarasaru sthiraṁ rājyaṁgayuttire tatpādapadmōpajīvi bhaṇḍārada basavamayyanāyakaradhikāri kalidēva nāyaka
ra pe¨rmmeyaṁ pēḷvaḍe . vri . suragajadaṁte dāni surarājatanūbhavanante śau¨ryyanuddhura surarājanaṁte vibdhāśrayanudgasurādriyaṁte susthiranasurāriyaṁte la
kṣmīdharaneṁdu samantu kū¨rttu bittaradoḷe baṇnikuṁ vibdhamaṁḍaḷi pe¨rggaḍe kalla mayyanaṁ . satyaparanakhiḻa janasaṁstutyanumēśāṁghri kamaḻavinamadbhṛṁgaṁ
nijagōtrābjāditya tānanipanalte sale kalidēvaṁ . Intaṁ negaḷtagaṁ pogaḷtagamāvāsamāda pannāyadadhikāri kalidēvanāyakaṁ śrī mūlasthānadēvara khaṁḍa
sphuṭita jī¨rṇnōddhārakkeṁdalliyācā¨ryya¨rggaṁgēśvarapaṇḍitare kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhārā pū¨rvvakaṁ māḍiyā dēvara tōṁṭadelege paṁnāyada suṁkamaṁ sa¨rvvanamasyamuṁ .
sa¨rvvabādhāparihāravāgi biṭṭaru © .
Digital edition of SII 15.36 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
